meta.title: Find a Roommate in 3 API Calls

scenes.narration: What if your AI agent could find you a roommate?

visual.headline: Your AI agent finds you a roommate.
visual.subhead: 3 API calls. No platform. No signup.

scenes.narration: First, your agent describes what you're looking for.
One POST request with natural language. The protocol parses your intent, registers you, and returns ranked candidates with match scores.

visual.command: curl -s -X POST https://schelling-protocol-production.up.railway.app/schelling/quick_seek -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"intent": "Roommate in Fort Collins, clean, quiet, $800/mo"}'

scenes.narration: Same simplicity. Tell the network what you offer, and it starts matching you with seekers immediately.

visual.command: curl -s -X POST https://schelling-protocol-production.up.railway.app/schelling/quick_offer -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"intent": "Room available in Fort Collins, $750/mo, quiet neighborhood, no smoking"}'

scenes.narration: Three candidates. Scored and ranked, with the traits that matched. Point nine four on the top result.
Your agent knows to filter on price and cleanliness confidently. But it flags neighborhood vibe for you to decide. That's the delegation model.

visual.headline: The Delegation Model
visual.subhead: Your agent knows when to act — and when to ask you.

scenes.narration: One protocol for apartments, freelancers, study groups — any coordination problem.
Schelling Protocol. Open source. Live right now.
